name: Traditional Multipurpose Storage Cabinet Multipurpose Classic White - Room Essentials™
description:
Transform the look and functionality of any space with this Multipurpose Traditional Cabinet from Room Essentials™. Made of wood, this traditional cabinet has a spacious adjustable shelf behind paneled doors, offering convenient storage for a variety of items, while the tabletop allows you to display vases, framed photos, decorative trays and more. Plus, it's designed in a classic white tone for easy integration into any room's decor scheme.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 31.97 inches
Overall Height: 30.20 inches
Overall Depth: 15 inches
Distance from floor to bottom: 3.35 inches
Distance between front legs: 28.3 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 11.3 inches
Width of door: 14 inches
Height of door: 23.1 inches
Distance between shelf on top and bottom: 11.3 inches
